name: Ginger Cordial 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the spices with the brandy and shake well.
2. Steep the mixture for six days.
3. Filter the steeped mixture.
4. Add the sugar syrup or honey to the filtered liquid.
5. If using honey, stir well until combined.
6. Allow the cordial to stand for three weeks.
7. Siphon off the clear liquid from the top of the mixture.
